name: Grace Fabric Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Grace Fabric Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of e-glass fabrics worldwide. The company offers middle and high grade e-glass fabric series. Its products are used in automotive structure parts, electrical insulation, high temperature insulation, building materials, aerospace, and sports equipment applications. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Shanghai, China.
